item.dc:creator: DerpyBestPrincess

item.title: Prior Fucking Authorization
item.description: Imagine calling a surgeon during a fucking cancer operation because an insurance spreadsheet needed attention. Somewhere in corporate America, a middle manager thought, "Yes, interrupt the person holding the scalpel." That's not healthcare. That's bureaucratic brain damage. Then, after she spoke publicly, the response wasn't, "Let's investigate." It was, "Here's a threatening six-page letter demanding you shut the fuck up." Nothing screams "We're definitely the good guys" like sending legal threats to doctors. Healthcare executives love saying patients come first... right up until profits wander into the room. Apparently the treatment plan is: deny, delay, intimidate, then act shocked when people get pissed off. What a spectacular pile of motherfucking bullshit. If doctors risk legal intimidation for telling the public what's happening behind the curtain, the system isn't protecting patients—it's protecting shareholders. That's fucked. ⚖️ #Healthcare #HealthInsurance #PatientRights #UnitedHealthcare #MedicalEthics
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: boasting of cruelty is a fascist hallmark
item.description:
Fascists like to boast about their great concentration camps.
(just ignore the wanton cruelty, sadism and death parts)
"Misusing your freedom" in a fascist state will get you imprisoned or murdered by the State.
"Misusers" of freedom
"Misusers" of freedom
Whitewashed and staged photos
Whitewashed and staged photos
Whitewashed and staged photos
Whitewashed and staged photos
Whitewashed and staged photos
Posted in LIFE magazine, 21 August 1939, just 11 days prior to the start of WWII.

item.title: I crack like a glowstick, but I don't glow anymore
item.dc:creator: LogicDude

item.title: We are not okay
item.description: I joined the military in 2008, my junior year of high school. I shipped out the next year. My stepmother and father were going through a divorce, leaving me without any resources, family, or anything. Quite literally was booted out of my house three months before graduation.My father wanted me to have to struggle on my own before the military. He wanted to see if I could survive his words, not mine. Years later, I got out of the army and found everything in shambles.The economy hadn't gotten any better. The government was constantly shut down and having been former military intelligence around now 2016, Donald Trump had started destroying every career opportunity that I possibly had. I'd gotten a network security degree by now, couldn't find work, could barely afford a horrible apartment in the least expensive place I could find. We've been at a constant state of war and the world has continuously gotten worse. I have access to the Veteran Affairs Loan before housing and even that, I still can't find housing. I don't have hope. I'm never going to get to enjoy my life. I'm heading into my 40s, still struggling like I was 10 years ago. I have to constantly ask people for help just to feed myself or keep the bills paid enough to keep the lights on. I'm now a disabled veteran, miserable, With no hope.
item.dc:creator: SquaresUnfiltered

item.title: Overwhelming Power of a Cybertruck
item.dc:creator: DOcelot1

item.title: I'm sorting through Charles McBryde's content and this I thought worth sharing
item.description: Laos is like a monument to all of America's sins, the dreadful result of Kissinger's decision to expand the Vietnam War beyond the borders of that country and into its neighborhood. For years, the United States has been paying to clean up the residue of its ill-conceived misadventure in Southeast Asia, but as the current administration cuts aid money and withdraws from the global stage, Laos is left to atone for America's sins all on its own. - Charles McBryde

item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: 10 books I enjoyed most of the 120 that I've read so far this year.
item.description:
Book two of a good sci-fi series. Group of Scientist kidnapped by an alien race as they try to figure out how to survive under their control.
The world goes insane as aliens arrive on earth. They are here for religious reasons. A lot of horror undertones in this book.
a litrpg with time loop/regressor troupes. I really enjoy the side characters.
Wonderful start to a urban fantasy series. What do you do when an demon fakes your signature on the soul contract?
What do you do when you wake up in your favorite and very deadly fantasy book world? Like what if you woke up in game of thrones world before the wars started?
Matt is fastly becoming my favorite author. I also really loved parade of horribles but this one edged it out just a little bit.
This was a great entry into the Dresden files to me. Seeing the main character deal with the grief he has over all the really bad things that have happened to him.
sci-fi corporate intrigue mixed with an almost John Wick level of badass figure.
Cozy space exploration
Slow burn old west vampires. This has been my favorite book of the year so far.
item.dc:creator: cacuin

item.title: This dude takes shelter dogs on trips around New York City in his backpack to help them get adopted. This week it's Tonka the Dalmatian
item.description: Tonka was adopted shortly after this vid was made. By a family with prior dog experience (agility training and kids to keep them busy)

item.dc:creator: HoldMyWallet

item.title: Last time I looked it said $120K..
item.description: I got my degree in 2011 and started a nonprofit in 2013. I didn't pay myself for the first 8 years as I grew it. 60 to 80 hour weeks with no pay and the most supportive wife in the world. Obama started the nonprofit program I used, which pays off the balance of your student loans if you make the right number of minimum payments for 10 years. Due to COVID and the constant assholery of the Republican administrations, it has become harder and harder to qualify, and it took a few more than 10 years to get the payments made. I made the last payment I 'needed' in February, but it took until yesterday for them to click the button and Do The Thing. 2 days ago I was still $120,000.00 in debt for college. Now I own my brain! Celebration time! EDIT: looks like it was signed into law in 2007 by Bush.
item.dc:creator: TechIsForEveryone

item.title: I was told after my first colonoscopy that I needed another in 5 years...now they are saying 10. Did someone take my turn?
item.description: They knocked me out with propofol and WOW...when I woke up I felt like I had just had the best sleep EVER despite only being out for about an hour. Makes me understand how MJ got hooked on the stuff.

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1754 (turkish kryptonite delight)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Arguably Terry Pratchett already wrote about that 4th option
There's a tree in Sedona where all the Crows and Ravens roost and whenever i pass it on a tour, I call it the Murder Tree. I then get asked who was murdered there, my people expecting juicy gossip, and most are delighted to learn, "Oh, nobody, that's where the crows go to sleep at night."
This is the Kauai'i O'o. The last bird of this species was recorded, and filmed: a male who sang a duet that a lady never answered. It went extinct in 1985, the year after i was born. This is how I feel trying to date.
Eeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee is the sound inside my head 99 percent of the time.
Sign me and Pippin up, we love ourselves artisinal apples.
I still have no good photos of Grey Catbird.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "beep" ___ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Carefully Curated Crap, Vol. 910
item.description:
1
2

8
9

16

18
19
20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Man Tax: Alex Hafner
Since we are destined to live out our lives in the prison of our minds, our one duty is to furnish it well. -Peter Ustinov So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Your compassion makes the difference.
item.description: The difference. Pity : I see you suffering, i dont really want to act on it. Empathy : You are happy, i become happy. Compassion : I see you suffering and we are going to do something about it. Together we will ease the pain. One love.

item.title: Walkies and Sploots
item.description:
Look at this cuteness!!! Best brothers <3
Earlier walkies today, they're so good in their harnesses
Bear knows EXACTLY where we're going
Okay so, please don't crucify me but... Walking two cats is hard with a single person. Fortunately Bob was pretty chill today. So Bear pulled me around and Bob actually did a great job of following along on his own. I think I might have some extendable leashes still, but for today this worked okay. I accept this is NOT the way to do things.
Here he is just following be and Bear around
Bear looking over the deck
Bob doing the same in almost the same spot lol
Partial sploots
Better sploots
Its hot today, the boys were done, we came inside
Supervised self walkies on the back deck
item.dc:creator: LosGatosDeLosGatos

item.title: a shelter on a rainy day
item.dc:creator: Cuturimpla

item.description:
A solar hole larger than 80 Earths is currently facing our planet A giant hole more than 620,000 miles (1 million kilometres) long has opened in the Sun's atmosphere and is facing Earth, where it is expected to send a stream of fast-moving solar wind our way later this week. Despite the name, a coronal hole is not a hole in the Sun itself. Instead, it is a region where the Sun's magnetic field opens into space, allowing charged particles to escape much more easily than usual. These high-speed streams of solar wind can travel at more than 500 miles per second (800 kilometres per second). When they reach Earth, they interact with our planet's magnetic field, sometimes triggering geomagnetic storms. Most people won't notice anything unusual. However, stronger geomagnetic activity can produce brighter auroras, especially across northern parts of the United States, Canada and Europe. In some cases, it can also cause minor disruptions to radio communications, GPS signals and satellite operations. Unlike powerful solar flares or coronal mass ejections, coronal holes usually produce longer-lasting but less intense space weather. They are a common feature of the Sun's 11-year activity cycle and can influence Earth's magnetic environment for several days at a time. Scientists will continue monitoring the coronal hole to determine how strong the incoming solar wind stream will be and whether any geomagnetic storm watches become necessary. https://earthsky.org/sun/sun-news-activity-solar-flare-cme-aurora-updates/ SPACE WEATHER FORECAST: 7..26 - Coronal Hole May Bring Storming Conditions https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=c0HEjD1lrww
A rare anemone active region AR 4493 has developed INSIDE the large coronal hole facing Earth. This has essentially split the coronal hole in two as active regions have large, overarching CLOSED magnetic fields which basically "repel" coronal holes and open magnetic field lines. The coronal hole is already affecting Earth. I will make a post soon, but the magnetic field strength of the solar wind is >15 nT, or around 3x stronger than usual. There is a chance of mid-latitude aurora tonight if conditions hold. This is conditional on having clear, dark, and smoke-free skies.
item.dc:creator: TheRainbowegoSweet007

item.dc:creator: PackratMagpie

item.title: Well that worked beautifully, huh?
item.description:
Providing this to show that I'm not the one who fed it to ChatGPT.
Full disclosure: I'm against generative AI and the mad dash for more compute that AI firms are doing that's destroying the environment and ruining the economy. I'm posting this mainly to educate people that anti-AI tools are very often just snake oil that don't actually work. If something works at tricking AI, it's only the AI they tested it on, and all bets are off with different models or other versions of the same model.
item.dc:creator: TheMoonBnuuy
